content.summaryText: Heimlich Maneuver Basics is part of Airway Emergencies in the theme Emergency Care Fundamentals. This module focuses on: Position correctly behind patient.

content.questionText: Which action best supports this course objective: Position correctly behind patient?
content.explanation: The best answer is the action that directly helps learners apply 'Position correctly behind patient' while studying Heimlich Maneuver Basics.

options.text: Use a structured checklist and verify outcomes
Skip baseline assessment to save time
Rely only on memory without documentation

content.summaryText: Practical emphasis: Deliver effective upward thrusts. Learners should practice concise decision-making and escalation when necessary.

content.questionText: A clear plan for 'Deliver effective upward thrusts' improves consistency in Heimlich Maneuver Basics.
content.explanation: Structured plans reduce omissions and improve safe, repeatable care.

content.sentence:
Start with <1> to establish baseline status.
Use <2> to deliver standardized intervention.
Document <3> to support continuity and quality review.
